relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file captures payment holiday application details (request submission), while the outbound file reports arrears status (account delinquency state). These represent fundamentally different business processes: one is a request/application workflow, the other is a status report. While both involve customer and account identifiers, the outbound file's core payload (arrears metrics, risk levels, payment dates) has no plausible source in an application submission. The files do not form a logical pipeline step.
